release_notes: **Unified Automation Engine & UI** — Completely refactored the previously disjointed "Cron" and "Heartbeat" systems into a single, unified "Automations" engine

changes.note: Force-kill gateway process during Windows update to prevent file locks.
Hardened Windows update batch script to wait longer and use xcopy correctly.
Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.5.2.
